problem id: d030b265
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(4) XOR SHR(7)

examples:
  10100011 -> 00110001
  11101100 -> 11000001
  01000000 -> 00000000
  00111100 -> 11000000
  00111110 -> 11100000
  11000110 -> 01100001
  01000101 -> 01010000
  10101101 -> 11010001

query: 00001100
predicted answer: 11000000
